q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: The sink is xml.dom.minidom.parseString() which performs XML parsing with external entity resolution enabled, constituting dangerous parsing behavior.

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: Not evaluated because Q1 was true

mock_guidance.capture: Capture the 'bar' parameter value and parser configuration
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Mock the parseString call to avoid actual XML parsing and external entity resolution, return a safe dummy document
notes: The parser enables external entities via feature_external_ges = True
bar contains user-controlled input from request.args
Must prevent actual XXE exploitation during testing
